title: Record
description: A change history record capturing a set of changes applied to a resource in a single operation, along with actor and timestamp metadata.

id.description: System-generated unique identifier for the record.

resourceVersion.description: The version of the resource after these changes were applied.

resourceType.description: The type of resource that was changed.

changes.description: List of individual field-level changes captured in this record.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the changes were made.

label.description: A label identifying the changed resource (e.g., product name, order number).

previousVersion.description: The version of the resource before these changes were applied.
